## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Hypergrowth and Growth X teams to discuss content strategy and upcoming projects.](https://fathom.video/share/4m93sRMggadPb_r7CcoFZ8XDbdz6h-gT?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New "Effective Craziness" piece ready for publication; LinkedIn version to be created](https://fathom.video/share/4m93sRMggadPb_r7CcoFZ8XDbdz6h-gT?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Future content ideas: advisory best practices, financial modeling (bottom-up vs top-down planning)](https://fathom.video/share/4m93sRMggadPb_r7CcoFZ8XDbdz6h-gT?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Team achieving faster content creation/editing cycles (25-30 min reviews vs previous 1hr+)](https://fathom.video/share/4m93sRMggadPb_r7CcoFZ8XDbdz6h-gT?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Optimal advisory engagement discussed: \~2hrs/week for meaningful impact and understanding](https://fathom.video/share/4m93sRMggadPb_r7CcoFZ8XDbdz6h-gT?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)

## Topics

### Content Progress: "Effective Craziness" Piece

  - [Final edits made; Guillaume to review changes and publish on Substack](https://fathom.video/share/4m93sRMggadPb_r7CcoFZ8XDbdz6h-gT?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Jen to create LinkedIn version based on the finalized piece](https://fathom.video/share/4m93sRMggadPb_r7CcoFZ8XDbdz6h-gT?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Team noted significant improvement in editing efficiency (25-30 min review vs. previous 1hr+)](https://fathom.video/share/4m93sRMggadPb_r7CcoFZ8XDbdz6h-gT?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)

### Upcoming Content Ideas

  - [Advisory best practices: candid feedback, fiduciary duty to founders/board, compensation alignment](https://fathom.video/share/4m93sRMggadPb_r7CcoFZ8XDbdz6h-gT?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
  - [Financial modeling: matching bottom-up and top-down plans (relevant for Q4 planning)](https://fathom.video/share/4m93sRMggadPb_r7CcoFZ8XDbdz6h-gT?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Potential piece on Guillaume's unique advisory approach (pending new client acquisition)](https://fathom.video/share/4m93sRMggadPb_r7CcoFZ8XDbdz6h-gT?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)

### Advisory Engagement Model

  - [Optimal engagement: \~2 hours/week allows for deep understanding of team, product, and market](https://fathom.video/share/4m93sRMggadPb_r7CcoFZ8XDbdz6h-gT?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [Pushback on minimal engagements (1-2 hrs/month) as ineffective for meaningful impact](https://fathom.video/share/4m93sRMggadPb_r7CcoFZ8XDbdz6h-gT?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Balance between being an external perspective and having enough involvement for trust/insight](https://fathom.video/share/4m93sRMggadPb_r7CcoFZ8XDbdz6h-gT?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)

### Team Workflow and Communication

  - [Noted improvement in content creation speed and quality](https://fathom.video/share/4m93sRMggadPb_r7CcoFZ8XDbdz6h-gT?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

  - [Team to consider breaking down existing advisory content into multiple targeted pieces](https://fathom.video/share/4m93sRMggadPb_r7CcoFZ8XDbdz6h-gT?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
